name: Swedish Saffron Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp canola, sunflower or safflower oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the flour, date sugar, dry milk, sea salt, saffron, warm water, and oil to your bread machine according to the manufacturer's instructions.
2. Place the currants in the machine at the first "beep."
3. Select the whole wheat or white bread cycle (in my ABM100, I used the WHITE BREAD cycle).
4. Follow the remaining machine settings as directed by the recipe book "The Bread Machine Gourmet."
